Title: Flowise: Airtable_Agent Code Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
Description:
ZDI-CAN-29412: FlowiseAI Flowise Airtable_Agent Code Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability

-- ABSTRACT -------------------------------------

Trend Micro's Zero Day Initiative has identified a vulnerability affecting the following products:
Flowise - Flowise

-- VULNERABILITY DETAILS ------------------------
* Version tested:   3.0.13
* Installer file:   hxxps://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise
* Platform tested:  Ubuntu 25.10
